abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Caught in the Ring
abilities.text: Models engaged by this model cannot target other models with attack actions.

abilities.name: Unyielding
abilities.text: When this model would be moved or controlled by another model, its owner may drain a (soulstone) to ignore that effect.

actions.name: Koschei, The Epitaph Blade
actions.effects: This model either heals 1 or gains a Life token.

triggers.name: Last Light
triggers.text: This model gains a Death token.

triggers.name: Mark the Way
triggers.text: Make a Lamp marker within 2" of the target.

triggers.name: In Memoriam
triggers.text: Choose a non-joker in the top five cards of this model's discard pile. Place the chosen card on top of this model's fate deck.

triggers.name: My Father's Legacy
triggers.text: Once per activation. Enemy models in the area between this model and the target are dealt 2 damage.

actions.name: Heartbeat of the Earth
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target another friendly model. This model may remove a Life token.
actions.effects: Move any number of enemy models engaging the target up to 4". If this model removed a Life token, increase the distance moved by +2".

triggers.name: Sudden Strike
triggers.text: This model may declare a (melee) action.

triggers.name: Mark the Way
triggers.text: Make a Lamp marker within 2" of the target.
